title: Cold Plunge vs Ice Bath: Temperature, Duration, Evidence-Graded Protocols (2026)
description: Cold plunges and ice baths are marketed as different — but the peer-reviewed literature treats them as variants of cold-water immersion. What the RCTs actually show about temperature, duration, and recovery vs. adaptation tradeoffs.
seoTitle: Cold Plunge vs Ice Bath: Evidence-Graded Protocols (2026)
seoDescription: Cold plunge vs ice bath compared by temperature protocols, RCT evidence for recovery and adaptation, safety, and cost. What the 47-study literature actually says.
imageAlt: Split-image of modern cold plunge tank and traditional ice bath tub against a dark retrofuturist background
